title: Assistant Store Manager - Kalyan Jewellers - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Kalyan Jewellers - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
